niche: AI-assisted resale valuation: used bikes and student resale
hook: Scan this bike before you pay the asking price
caption_or_visible_text: Comment scan and I will check the next campus listing.
visual_notes: Opens on the item and asking price, then shows condition checks, comparable listings, repair risk, and a buy/pass payoff.
why_it_may_work: The hook creates immediate price tension and gives the viewer a fast checklist they can apply to their own listing.
remake_notes: Use the same structure for scooters, mini fridges, textbooks, and dorm furniture with local comparable prices.
evidence_notes: Manual Creative Center observation recorded from visible UI only; no scraping, hidden endpoint, login bypass, or private metric collection.
